boardsPage.title: Boards
boardsPage.signInToSee: Sign in to view your boards.
boardsPage.empty: No boards yet — create the first one in the sidebar.

boardsSidebar.title: Boards
boardsSidebar.dialogCreateDescription: Enter a name for the new board.
boardsSidebar.deleteConfirmDescription: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted. Tasks and members will be lost.

boardSettings.descriptionNamed: Board «{{title}}». Invite members by email or display name.
boardSettings.descriptionGeneric: Invite members by email or display name.
boardSettings.queryHint: Enter a query to search all profiles.
boardSettings.allFilteredOut: All results are you, the owner, or already members.
boardSettings.noMatches: No users match this query. They must
boardSettings.noMatchesTail: in the app once to appear in the profile directory. Check the email spelling.

authDialog.configHint: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to your environment.
authDialog.signInDescription: Enter your email and password to access your workspace.
authDialog.signUpDescription: Create an account with your email and a password.
authDialog.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.

board.pickFromSidebar: Choose a board from the sidebar.

column.deleteDescription: Column «{{title}}» and all cards in it will be permanently deleted.

columnForm.descCreate: Set the column title and header color.
columnForm.deleteConfirmDescription: Column «{{title}}» and all cards in it will be permanently deleted.

taskCard.dialogEditHint: Changes are saved to the database.
taskCard.deleteCardDescription: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted from the database.

taskForm.createHint: The card will be saved on the board.
taskForm.noMembersHint: Add members in board settings to assign tasks.

aiBreakdown.title: AI task breakdown
aiBreakdown.hint: Describe a large task; the service returns sub-tasks as cards in the selected column.
aiBreakdown.placeholder: e.g. Implement authentication for the app
aiBreakdown.noColumns: Add at least one column to import sub-tasks.
aiBreakdown.emptyItems: The API returned no usable items (each needs a title).
